stemHtml:
Refer to figure or ALICANTE 10-2C chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
What is correct regarding the GERVU 1M STAR procedure?

options.a: It can be flown using conventional navigation and RNAV.
options.b: It can be flown using conventional navigation only.
options.c: It can only be flown with VOR/DME based RNAV, as that is how the waypoints are defined.
options.d: It is a RNAV route, and can't be performed with only conventional navigation.
